bio_home: An aspiring Data Scientist and AI Engineer passionate about machine learning, intelligent systems, and data-driven innovation. I build projects that turn complex data into practical, impactful solutions while continuously exploring the evolving world of AI.
bio_about: I'm Don Nipuni Athale, an undergraduate in Information Technology specializing in Data Science, driven by a deep passion for Artificial Intelligence and intelligent systems. My work focuses on transforming complex data into meaningful insights, building machine learning models, and exploring the evolving frontiers of AI. Through continuous learning and hands-on projects, I aim to create solutions that bridge innovation, logic, and human impact.

timeline.org: Sri Lanka Institute of Information Technology (SLIIT)
timeline.description: Core coursework spans Object-Oriented Programming, Discrete Mathematics, Machine Learning, Databases, and Statistics — with a growing focus on applied AI projects.

timeline.title: Independent Data Science & AI Projects
timeline.description: Designed and shipped 20+ end-to-end projects spanning ML, NLP, generative AI, and data visualization — see the full archive on the Projects page.

timeline.description: Staying current with the evolving frontiers of AI through structured courses, papers, and hands-on experimentation.
